Best AI Chatbots & Assistants (2026)

Conversational AI assistants for answering questions, research, coding help, and everyday productivity.

ChatGPT by OpenAI

The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available; Plus $20/mo; Pro $200/mo

Gemini by Google

Google's AI assistant, deeply integrated with Search, Gmail, Docs, and Android.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available; Gemini Advanced from $19.99/mo (via Google One AI Premium)

Claude by Anthropic

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available; Pro $20/mo; Max plans from $100/mo

Perplexity by Perplexity AI

An AI-powered answer engine that cites sources for every response.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available; Pro $20/mo

AI Tool Finder — independent AI tool reviews and comparisons. Some links may be affiliate links, at no extra cost to you.
